title: v1 → v2 API Cutover — retire /samantha/v1
scope: Retire /samantha/v1 entirely. Every non-infra route group moves to /samantha/v2 as its backing data migrates to vector_artefacts. Auth/nav/user infrastructure routes are promoted to unversioned root-level endpoints (alongside /healthz). The OpenAPI spec is split into openapi.yaml (v1, frozen on deprecation) and openapi-v2.yaml (v2, live). The /samantha/v1 router block is removed from main.go once all routes have moved. Deprecation + Sunset headers gate the removal.
value: Establishes a clean, stable external API surface on /samantha/v2 backed entirely by vector_artefacts. Removes the dual-pool complexity from main.go. Allows the OpenAPI spec to accurately describe what each version serves, enabling external SDK consumers and the WorkItemsTree DnD surface to call v2 without routing through legacy infrastructure.
implementation_plan: Task 1: Create openapi-v2.yaml — standalone spec for /samantha/v2 paths only (work-items, rank/move, timeboxes/sprints); update check_routes.sh + check_callers.py to validate against both specs; update api:snap to snapshot both.
Task 2: Migrate /timeboxes/sprints mutations (POST, PUT, DELETE, bulk-create) — audit permission middleware, register under v2 alongside existing GET routes, remove v1 registration.
Task 3: Migrate /workspace/{id}/fields + /workspace/{id}/portfolio/layers — unblock after PLA-0026 completes; remove pool fallback, register under v2.
Task 4: Migrate /portfolio (master record) + /tenant-settings — unblock after PLA-0024 + PLA-0026; register under v2.
Task 5: Migrate /topology — requires org_nodes data migration to vector_artefacts (new sub-plan); register under v2 once data is live.
Task 6: Architectural decision — /portfolio-models (libPools.RO) — stays library-scoped or moves to vector_artefacts; implement decision.
Task 7: Migrate /defects + /user-stories + /flows — requires data migration to vector_artefacts (new sub-plan).

Task 8: Promote infra routes to root-level — /auth, /me, /nav, /user/tab-order, /custom-pages, /addressables, /page-help, /roles, /admin, /errors, /library/releases, /workspaces become unversioned; frontend switches to apiInfra().
Task 9: Deprecation — add Deprecated: true to all v1 paths in openapi.yaml; add Deprecation + Sunset headers to v1 router middleware; set sunset date.
Task 10: Remove /samantha/v1 block from main.go; archive openapi.yaml → openapi-v1-archived.yaml; openapi-v2.yaml becomes the canonical spec.
areas_impacted: Backend: backend/cmd/server/main.go — v1 block removal, v2 registrations, infra route promotion
Frontend: app/lib/api.ts API_BASE, all api() call sites migrating to apiV2() or apiInfra()
Spec: openapi.yaml (v1 freeze), openapi-v2.yaml (new v2 spec)
Toolchain: check_routes.sh, check_callers.py, snap_api.sh — dual-spec awareness
Data: org_nodes, defects, user-stories, flows, portfolio — vector_artefacts migrations
feature_list: /samantha/v2/tenant-settings — blocked (master_record_tenant in mmff_vector; needs data migration)
Infra routes promoted to root-level ✅ done (2026-05-09)
v1 Deprecation + Sunset headers ✅ done (2026-05-09, sunset 2026-08-07)
features_removed: openapi.yaml as the live spec (becomes archived v1)

work_item_backlog.title: Migrate /topology to v2 (requires data migration sub-plan)
Promote infra routes to root-level unversioned
Add Deprecated + Sunset headers to v1 middleware

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /samantha/v1/work-items returns 410 Gone (or 404) — no v1 router block
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: curl smoke test against running backend

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All frontend api() call sites have migrated to apiV2() or apiInfra() — check_callers.py reports 0 api() callers
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: npm run api:check exits 0 with caller-map: 0 api() endpoints

acceptance_criteria.criterion: openapi-v2.yaml exists and check_routes.sh validates v2 routes against it with 0 errors

risks.risk: Several route groups (topology, defects, user-stories, flows) require data migrations to vector_artefacts that are not yet planned — v1 retirement is blocked until those land
risks.mitigation: Register as sub-plans as each data domain comes into scope. v1 stays live (with Deprecation headers) until all migrations are complete.

risks.risk: /portfolio-models uses a library read-only pool — architectural decision on whether it moves to vector_artefacts or stays library-scoped is unresolved
risks.mitigation: Defer Task 6 until PLA-0026 is complete; make the decision in that context.

risks.risk: Infra route promotion (auth, nav, etc.) requires all frontend callers to switch to apiInfra() — missed callers would break auth silently
risks.mitigation: check_callers.py already tracks apiInfra() callers; extend it to enforce that /auth/* etc. are never called via api() or apiV2().
